item.title: F-006: Syntax Highlighting
item.intent: Code blocks must look good — syntax highlighting makes markdown files with code feel professional and readable
item.description: Fenced code blocks with language detection from info string. Min languages: Python, JS/TS, Swift, Go, Rust, HTML/CSS, JSON, YAML, SQL, Bash, Ruby, Java, Kotlin, C/C++, PHP. Monospace font, background differentiation. Editable inline. Colors adapt to dark/light theme.
acceptanceCriteria: User writes a fenced code block with a language tag — code is syntax-highlighted correctly
Highlighting adapts correctly in both light and dark modes
Unknown or unsupported language tag falls back to plain monospace, no broken rendering
Empty code block renders correctly with background but no content
Code block inside a blockquote renders with both blockquote border and code background
